heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
label: 1001 to 1010 Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
notes: Section 1001, , pt. II, § 250, , prohibited discrimination between Regulars and reserve components. See , Armed Forces.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 495section 10209 of Title 10

Section 1002, , pt. II, § 251, , authorized Secretaries of the Army, Navy, Air Force, and the Treasury, to make and publish regulations. See and , Pay and Allowances of the Uniformed Services.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 495section 10202 of Title 10section 417(a) of Title 37
Section 1003, , pt. II, § 252, , provided for reserve participation in administration of policy and regulations. See , Armed Forces.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 496section 10211 of Title 10
Section 1004, , pt. II, § 253, , related to support of reserve components. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 496section 12501 of Title 10
Section 1005, , pt. II, § 254, , related to boards, membership of boards, seniority. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 496section 12643 of Title 10
Section 1006, , pt. II, § 255, , related to availability of supplies, equipment, and facilities. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 496section 18502 of Title 10
Section 1007, , pt. II, § 256, , provided for responsibility for Reserve affairs. See sections 10203 and 18501 of Title 10.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 496

Section 1008, , pt. II, § 257(a)–(d), , related to creation, composition and representation on the Reserve Forces Policy Board, provided that the Board should be the principal policy adviser to the Secretary of Defense. See . Subsec. (e) of section 257 of act , as amended , title VII, § 702(c), , was restated in section 133 [now 113] of Title 10.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 497section 10301 of Title 10Sept. 3, 1954, ch. 125768 Stat. 1189July 9, 1952
Section 1009, , pt. II, § 258, , related to personnel records. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 498section 10204 of Title 10
Section 1010, , pt. II, § 259, , related to dissemination of information. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 498section 10210 of Title 10
